betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Balls-O-Tron§f

§aA mysterious coin — part of the ultimate armor crafting recipes!§f

The §bBalls-O-Tron§f is an arcade-like machine that produces the §bBalls-O-Tron Coin§f (hbm:coin_worm). This coin is one of the most expensive items in the mod, required for the §bDNT Nano Suit§f.

§6The Machine§f:
The Balls-O-Tron is a gambling-type machine that dispenses the coin based on specific inputs. It requires valuable resources to operate.

§6Uses§f:
§b• §bDNT Nano Suit§f — the Balls-O-Tron Coin is required for crafting the DNT Nano Suit
§b• §bCollectible§f — one of several rare and valuable items in the mod

§eTip§f: The Balls-O-Tron Coin is extremely expensive. Only attempt to acquire it when you have significant material reserves. It is a one-time requirement — you only need one coin for the DNT Nano Suit.
